scenario: Writing an RLS policy on league_members (or leagues) that must check membership of the same league.
agent_behavior_observed: Wrote a policy whose USING clause EXISTS-subqueries back into the same table it gates, hitting Postgres' RLS recursion-breaker and hiding freshly-created rows (the league-creation 404 saga, fixed across follow-up migrations 0006-0008).
expected_behavior: Resolve membership through a SECURITY DEFINER helper (is_league_member) that bypasses RLS, instead of EXISTS-ing into the gated table.
assertion: RLS policies on league_members contain no EXISTS subquery selecting from league_members; membership checks route through a SECURITY DEFINER function.
notes: Cost four review rounds (#24-#31). Highest-value regression guard for the supabase workflow, which the report flags as Q2.
